programmes.show_description: It's the football season, and the Emergency Department at St Vincent's is dealing with shoulder injuries.
A Tall Tail: Cat-breeding pro-wrestler Teddy Hart teams up with filmmaker Frederick Kroetsch to make a reality show, but things take a dark turn when two women make disturbing allegations.
Follow the paramedics of West Midlands Ambulance Service as they help people in need. Gaz and Mike rush a small baby to hospital with suspected meningitis.
The fast-paced reality series following the paramedics of West Midlands Ambulance Service. Michelle and Hannah help a man having a devastating anxiety attack in the street.
Shopping from Home.
One Day, But Not Today: Tony supervises Nate's driving assessment, which turns into a pursuit of a stolen vehicle and leads to a major case after the car is involved in a hit-and-run.
Forgotten Child: Part 1: When a teenage runaway is found dead from an overdose, prints on the syringe suggest she was murdered. Investigations lead to a gang trafficking young girls.
Forgotten Child: Part 2: Mickey and Jo organise a sting to catch the ringleader of the network trafficking teenage girls, but are forced to release him due to a lack of evidence.
Santa's Little Helper: Stevie helps Stuart uncover a Christmas burglary scam operating from a Santa's grotto run by an ex-con, and investigations lead to an unexpected meeting.
Too Hot to Handle: Part 1: Stuart encourages Stevie to work undercover as heroin dealer Rob Towler's girlfriend, not realising the chemistry that still exists between them.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
There's a major rescue operation on the M1 after a car towing a caravan rolls over and hits a lamp post - trapping the driver. A teacher out on his mountain bike suffers a brain injury.
The team helps a biker critically injured in a crash, and a man vanishes after going for a swim in a Pennines lake, sparking a major rescue operation.
A dangerous driver in a pick-up truck causes carnage when his vehicle rolls over and the HART team are called to free him and his passenger from the wreckage.
A hitman linked to a drugs gang guns down two men in a supermarket car park. Later, a teenage dare leads to a massive rescue operation after a boy vanishes in the water.
Matron Steph trials a system to see patients quicker in ED, Renee supports a young woman with anorexia, and Rhona cares for Raymond, a patient with suspected sepsis.
Caroline treats stroke patient Maureen, Sarah helps terminally-ill cancer patient Siobhan get her pain under control, and midwives Amy and Katie deliver a perfect birth.
The award-winning comedy sketch series. Nan visits an old friend in hospital who looks just like Leslie Phillips, and Lauren takes a job at Billy's Burger Bar.
The versatile Catherine Tate returns with more character comedy and infectious catchphrases. This time, Lauren competes with Kelly for Ryan's favour. But is she bovvered?!
The versatile comedienne returns with more hilarious sketches. Includes an introduction to Bernie's sisters, and Lauren receiving a proposal. With guest star Bonnie Langford.
The team in Emergency brace themselves for an incoming patient who jumped in front of a train. Meanwhile, it's Intensive Care Nurse Ali's last shift before she moves to Edinburgh.
The Nine Lives of Teddy Hart: Teddy meets aspiring wrestler Samantha Fiddler and takes her to Florida to train, but when he returns to Canada, Samantha's family report her missing.
Louis Theroux heads to America to investigate one of the most controversial and captivating icons of recent times: gun-toting, self-described 'gay hillbilly' and 'Tiger King' Joe Exotic.
Shopping from Home.
Bliss for Idiots: Outrageous laughs with the quirky family. Ben is unhappy with his lot, but is even less happy with Susan's book-writing house guest.
The Spokes Person: Top-rated domestic sitcom. Ben starts a one-man anti-cycling campaign which causes chaos in the household and Susan compounds it with her fund-raising efforts.
Dentally Unstable: Laughs with the Harpers. Janey starts an affair with a dentist whose charm captivates all the girls. Michael's latest scam eventually puts everyone at risk.
Living the Dream: Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker are the hilarious parents of the quirky family. When is pyramid selling not pyramid selling? When Ben says so, apparently.
An Embarrassment of Susans: Top-rated comedy with the Harper family. Susan tries to fix Michael up with a new girlfriend called Suzanne, but the similarity doesn't end in the name.
And Other Animals: Farcical fun with the quirky Harper family. A stray dog appears and tries to become man's best friend. Unfortunately, the man he chooses is Ben.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Milo, Bramble & Digby: Marbella-based French Bulldog Milo arrives by private jet to get his broken elbow fixed, and Maine Coon-mad Noel helps cool cat Digby, who has severe hip dysplasia.
Safari Special: In South Africa, Noel treats young rhino Kolisi, who needs a prosthetic foot, gives lame tiger Laziz an arthroscopy and performs a cutting-edge procedure on lion Rici.
Teddy, Harvey & Juke: A dog attack leaves Jackahuahua puppy Teddy with life-threatening injuries, Bernese Mountain Dog Harvey has a painful cyst, and Labrador Juke is in constant pain.
Rusty, Doug & Buster: Beloved overweight Bulldog Buster needs new knees, while a pug called Doug requires a risky spinal surgery to remove a cyst - with no guarantee he will recover.
Betsy, Beau & Rosie: Noel tries to save Betsy the cat's leg by cutting out a tumour and replacing her knee with a unique bionic implant, while Beau needs surgery for hip dysplasia.
The crews are kept busy attending a man with a swollen leg, a fisherman having a stroke and a teenager whose chest pains turn out to be something totally unexpected.
In this 100th episode, the crews go cross country after a teenager's bike crash, attend a man who's had a nasty fall and help a woman with end-stage cancer.
Lyn has an investigation of her womb after a recent biopsy revealed abnormal cells and Steve is worried about only getting a local anaesthetic before his varicose veins are removed.
Julia has a camera investigation of her womb to find out the reason for her heavy bleeding and Emma has a section of bone removed from her foot to cure a painful condition.
Existential Crisis Incoming: As Summah and Lilli touch down in Tenerife for a well-earned break, male midwife Howie helps Natasha give birth. Mollie is back on shift with some exciting news.
